title: Arai Climax X

specs.material: Multi-Directional Impact Protection System (MIPS) with Arai's proprietary EPS liner and Carbon Fiber reinforced shell

technical_analysis: The Arai Climax X utilizes a revolutionary multi-density EPS liner architecture designed to dissipate kinetic energy across a broader spectrum of impact vectors compared to traditional single-density foams. By integrating the MIPS low-friction slip plane directly into the shell interface, the system effectively rotates the head relative to the skull during oblique impacts, reducing rotational forces that are often responsible for concussive injuries. The outer shell employs a carbon-fiber-reinforced composite layup that maintains structural rigidity at high speeds while offering superior abrasion resistance without adding excessive mass.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of safety and performance with the Arai Climax X, engineered for riders who demand uncompromising protection without sacrificing style. This full-face helmet represents a paradigm shift in headgear technology, blending advanced impact absorption systems with an aerodynamic silhouette that cuts through the wind with precision. Whether you are carving corners on the track or cruising open roads, the Climax X provides the confidence of knowing your head is guarded by the industry's most rigorous safety standards.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Arai Climax X: a full-face motorcycle helmet featuring MIPS technology, carbon-fiber reinforced shell, and ECE 22.06 certification. Rated for intermediate oval heads with premium ventilation.
